name: Share API

requests.name: Get entry by ID
requests.description: Fetch a database entry by ID with its attachments via the read-only API. Returns the entry data plus an attachments array with file_url for file-type attachments. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true in config/app.php. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries/1

requests.name: Get entry by ID (POST body)
requests.description: Fetch a database entry by sending the ID in a JSON POST body. Alternative to GET /entries/{id}. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries

requests.name: Get entry by ID (with auth)
requests.description: Fetch a database entry by ID with Basic Auth. Requires api_enabled=true, db_enabled=true, and api_auth_enabled=true in config/app.php. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries/1

requests.name: Download attachment file
requests.description: Download a file attachment by its attachment ID. Returns the file with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers. Requires api_enabled=true, db_enabled=true, and storage_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/files/1

requests.name: List reserved fields
requests.description: List all reserved underscore-prefixed control fields accepted by the webhook. Returns a JSON object with _version, optional _deploy_id, and a data array of field descriptors (name, type, description). Requires api_enabled=true. Does not require db_enabled or authentication. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/fields

requests.name: Get auth method
requests.description: Report the authentication method required by the API. Returns 'none' when api_auth_enabled is false, 'basic' when true. Requires api_enabled=true. Does not require db_enabled or authentication. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/auth

requests.name: List entries (paginated)
requests.description: List all entries with pagination and attachment counts. Optionally filter by project_id, status_id, resolution_id, or any custom field. Returns entries ordered by created_at DESC. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries?page=1&per_page=5

requests.name: Update entry
requests.description: Update an entry's subject, body, and/or custom field values (e.g. status_id, resolution_id). Returns the full entry with attachments. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries/1

requests.name: Delete entry
requests.description: Delete an entry and all its attachments. Associated files are removed from disk. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/entries/1

requests.name: Delete attachment
requests.description: Delete a single attachment by its ID. The associated file is removed from disk. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/attachments/1

requests.name: List custom fields
requests.description: List all custom fields with option counts. Returns default seeded fields (project, status, resolution) plus any user-created fields. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields

requests.name: Create custom field
requests.description: Create a new custom field. Name must be lowercase letters and underscores only. Returns 409 if name already exists. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields

requests.name: Update custom field
requests.description: Update a custom field's description and/or sort order. Returns 404 if not found. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields/priority

requests.name: Delete custom field
requests.description: Delete a custom field and all its options and pivot rows. Returns 404 if not found. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields/priority

requests.name: Export custom fields
requests.description: Export all custom fields with their options as nested JSON. Output can be fed directly into POST /custom-fields/import. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields/export

requests.name: Import custom fields
requests.description: Import custom fields with options in merge mode (INSERT OR IGNORE). Existing fields and options are skipped. Safe to re-import. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/custom-fields/import

requests.name: List field options
requests.description: List all options for a custom field with entry counts. Returns 404 if the field does not exist. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/field-options/status

requests.name: Create field option
requests.description: Create a new option for a custom field. Returns 404 if field not found, 409 if option name already exists. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/field-options/status

requests.name: Rename field option
requests.description: Rename an option within a custom field. Returns 404 if field or option not found, 409 if name already exists. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/field-options/status/1

requests.name: Delete field option
requests.description: Delete an option from a custom field and remove all associated pivot rows. Returns 404 if field or option not found. Requires api_enabled=true and db_enabled=true. Clean URL alternative: <<baseURL>>api/field-options/status/1

description: JSON API (api.php) — entry CRUD, custom field CRUD, field option CRUD, export/import, file download, and field metadata. All JSON responses include _version and optionally _deploy_id.
